faqs.question: Why do I have crickets in my Forest Hills home?
faqs.answer: Crickets are attracted to moisture, warmth, and vegetation. Forest Hills' abundant gardens, mature trees, and proximity to Forest Park create ideal cricket habitats. They often enter homes through cracks, gaps around windows and doors, or basement openings, especially during late summer and fall.

faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for families and pets when applied by our trained professionals. We follow strict safety protocols and can accommodate special requests for sensitive households, including eco-friendly treatment options.
